title: Air-dry clay napkin ring set
notes: Set of four napkin rings, each formed by wrapping a slab strip around a cardboard tube former (kitchen-roll tube cut into rings). Clay strip is approximately 40 mm wide and 4 mm thick, wrapped and joined with slip. Embossed with a stamp or incised pattern while wet. Remove from former when leather-hard. PVA sealed. Each ring approximately 45 mm diameter, 40 mm tall.
